a.label: d_epsilon
a.standard_term: auxiliary constant m_epsilon(1-n_epsilon) used in Landen-transformation coordinate bookkeeping

b.label: m_epsilon, n_epsilon, A_epsilon, B_epsilon
b.standard_term: epsilon-parametrized family unifying the primary (k^2, n) and dual (k_dual^2, n_dual) moduli/characteristics with their third-kind-integral coefficients

evidence.label: Complementary-interval quantities bar m_epsilon, c_epsilon a
evidence.summary: \bar m_\epsilon=1-m_\epsilon, \qquad c_\epsilon=\frac{m_\epsilon}{m_\epsilon-n_\epsilon}. \tag{4.5} For the DBP parameters, \frac{d_\epsilon}{m_\epsilon-n_\epsilon} = \bar m_\epsilon. \tag{4.6}

evidence.label: Alternate closed form of the anti-invariant coefficient
Constant d_epsilon and F_epsilon in u-coordinate
evidence.summary: d_\epsilon=m_\epsilon(1-n_\epsilon) = \frac{1+\epsilon s}{16}. In the u-coordinate, F_\epsilon(u) = A_\epsilon \frac{m_\epsilon}{d_\epsilon-n_\epsilon u} -B_\epsilon. \tag{3.6}
